task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Bose Smart Soundbar 900 (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $899.00 and wholesale is $629.00. Product features: Premium soundbar with Dolby Atmos and proprietary PhaseGuide technology. Reference: https://www.bose.com/en_us/products/speakers/soundbars/bose-smart-soundbar-900.html

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Bose Smart Soundbar 900. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Bose Smart Soundbar 900. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
